## Source: ghsa-malware (5acb95a7594a27e0298f3994338f43788dc9e4f46d5c467c54432fd020f48af4)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (0aa190f5fe08b29ab6f7230c099bdc2a201b7d5212f434f9e44b2be1feba5de1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'proton-pfff' @ 99.99.5 (crates.io) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
